{{Quote|General, a Hortek does not leave the bodies of his comrades in the hands of the enemy—ever.|Ejagga Pakkpekatt, to Carlist Rieekan|<ref name="Shield of Lies">''[[Shield of Lies]]''</ref>}}
'''Ejagga Pakkpekatt''' was a [[Hortek]] officer in [[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic Intelligence]].

==Biography==
Pakkpekatt began his career as an officer in the [[Interrogation (Alliance Intelligence)|Interrogation Department]] of [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]]. There, he was assigned to the Alliance's most stubborn [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] prisoners, where he used his Hortek telepathic abilities and intimidation skills to access information beyond standard interrogators.

After the formation of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], he was transferred to the [[Special Threats Division]] of New Republic Intelligence. A stern officer, Pakkpekatt was unpopular amongst some members of the [[Council on Security and Intelligence]] (CSI).

Because of his hunting instincts and impressive track record, [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] Pakkpekatt was placed in command in [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]] of the expedition charged with intercepting the [[Teljkon Vagabond]]. Immediately, Pakkpekatt was at odds with [[General/Legends|General]] [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], dispatched by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Hiram Drayson/Legends|Hiram Drayson]] under the guise of representing the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|Defense Fleet]]. After Calrissian and his crew boarded the Vagabond against Pakkpekatt's orders, the colonel attempted to give chase when it vanished at [[Gmar Askilon]]. When the CSI recalled most of his task force for duty in the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]], Pakkpekatt took a volunteer crew aboard [[Lady Luck/Legends|''Lady Luck'']] to rescue Calrissian, [[Lobot/Legends|Lobot]], [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]]. Pakkpekatt and his crew found the Vagabond through a [[slave circuit]], and they were pulled through a series of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] jumps until arriving at [[Brath Qella]], where the mystery of the Vagabond was made clear.
